title: Graphical Proof: Rationale Dosing Based on Body Size
text:
Set up Enivronment

library(conflicted)
library(tidyverse)

── Attaching core tidyverse packages ──────────────────────── tidyverse 2.0.0 ──
✔ dplyr     1.2.0     ✔ readr     2.2.0
✔ forcats   1.0.1     ✔ stringr   1.6.0
✔ ggplot2   4.0.2     ✔ tibble    3.3.1
✔ lubridate 1.9.5     ✔ tidyr     1.3.2
✔ purrr     1.2.1     

conflict_prefer("filter", "dplyr")

[conflicted] Will prefer dplyr::filter over any other package.

conflict_prefer("lag", "dplyr")

[conflicted] Will prefer dplyr::lag over any other package.



#####Load Packages#####
options(scipen=999)
library(tidyverse)


##Functions
wt_allo <- function(wt, alpha = 1){
  alpha*wt^0.75
}


##Weight Range
data <- data.frame(wt = 1:300) #Feasible weights across lifespan and demographic variation
data <- data %>% 
  mutate(mgperkg = 1*wt, 
         allometric = wt_allo(wt))

##Predictions
